risk_findings.summary: Daily reset mechanics make multi-day outcomes path-dependent.
Choppy markets can erode returns even when the reference asset is range-bound.
The trade record should state the intended holding period before entry.
Macro events and market closures can change gap and rebalance risk.

sources: Add the approved lab note as a source if it is part of the research record.
risks: Map daily-reset, volatility-drag, and event-risk findings into source-backed risk records.
position_rules: Map max size, holding period, stop-review, and event-avoidance rules into source-backed position rules.
checklist: Keep pre-entry confirmation items open until reviewed.
reviews: Record whether the lab output changes the latest policy or trade decision.

decision_review_pack_usage.consume: After mapping findings into the ledger, the packet will surface them through high risks, open position rules, checklist gaps, and review evidence.
decision_review_pack_usage.complement: Attach or co-locate this lab artifact with the packet when a reviewer needs leveraged ETP-specific mechanics beyond the ledger summary.

non_advice_boundary: Research organization example only; no buy, sell, or hold recommendation is made.
